title: アタシはアイツと違うから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have gone by since the tryouts, and I can't help but worry
about Daiwa Scarlet. If I could just talk to her one more time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head out to look for her, but by the time I find her, she's already
surrounded by plenty of other trainers.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
The way the tryouts ended was certainly regrettable, but you too
have what it takes to win a G1!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ..."You too?"

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I've got a plan all laid out! Instead of flying out the gate, you could
save your energy for the end. That way, just like Vodka, you can w—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: "Just like"... Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: U-ummm...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but are we finished here? ...Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet promptly leaves the scene, sporting a rather
intimidating smile.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. I heard that she was an exemplary honor student, but isn't she
quite temperamental?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That attitude is a pass for me... She might have the talent, but even
that only goes so far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For now, I need to go after Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's all the commotion about?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aughhh! You don't needa stick to me all day! I told you, gimme some
time to think!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but you keep on running away! Vodka, come join my
team! I've already made arrangements for you to go overseas!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I get it, I really do! So leave me alone for a bit, would ya?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Hey... Wait up, Vodka! I'm not giving up! I will make you the number one racer!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Number one...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Finally found you, Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? A-Air Groove?! Um, did you need something from me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A warning.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've come to warn you in my capacity as vice president. Daiwa Scarlet,
recently, you've been sneaking out of the dorm every night, haven't
you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Uh... A-about that...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Breaking curfew to go out at night without applying for permission
beforehand is inexcusable.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: An honor student like you should know that by heart, Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am. Please accept... my sincerest apologies.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Good grief...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You were out running, weren't you? A considerable amount every
night, too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um... H-how did you know that?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I can easily tell by your expression and gait.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you know this, but you're overworking yourself. You should
stop before you injure yourself or something worse happens.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But I...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I... came in second. Even though I was aiming to be number one. Even though I had to be number one!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Every runner experiences it—the moment when their knees hit the
turf. Words of wisdom from my mother.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What's important is how you stand up and recover. Failure is not
something to be feared.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But, this has never happened before! I was always number one! I put
my all into making sure that would stay the same!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Air Groove. I'm being ridiculous... aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's laughable, isn't it? Just because I was a little faster than the
competition back home, I acted like I was number one—like I was
something... Not to mention this whole honor student bit.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But you know, when I finally got to Tracen Academy... I easily lost to
opponents like Vodka—opponents who were the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: In reality... Becoming "number one"? I'm just not cut out—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Silence. Don't you dare finish that sentence.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You won't be able to take those words back.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: S-sorry. I...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I... I don't know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet continues muttering to herself again and again, clearly
frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If only there was something I could do for her...
